author: mark
text:
Integration test: bl close --resolve-remote end-to-end

bl-e454 shipped --resolve-remote with five unit tests that all drive populate_on_close directly; the CLI wiring from CloseArgs.resolve_remote through cmd_close's resolve_remote || deferred to close_worktree had no end-to-end coverage. Line coverage marks that expression covered via the flag-false close tests, so a dropped argument or inverted bool could regress silently.

tests/close_resolve_remote.rs drives the real bl binary across two repos: a task store whose integration branch never carries the [bl-xxxx] squash, and a separate code repo that does. Three tests: the flag resolves delivered_in cross-repo; the flag-less companion leaves it null (proving the flag is load-bearing); deferred mode auto-engages resolution with no flag. Primary assertions stay on delivered_in — delivered_repo after a remote-resolved close is bl-6816's subject and is left unasserted so the suite is stable whichever way that lands.
